final_prompt.prompt:
Create a 小红书-style 9-grid cover image for a 素人 media creator.

Style/medium: needs a "素人风格" aesthetic — references in the spirit of 2010s early Instagram lifestyle flat-lays, Japanese 雑誌風 cutout collage tradition, early Xiaohongshu organic content aesthetic; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be 9-grid layout (nine equal sections)
Subject: must include DJI Pocket 4 as the featured product
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: 
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "大疆pocket4初体验" (central title, cute and differentiated typography style)
Constraints: must be vertical cover image format suitable for 小红书, 9-grid structure must be clearly visible
Avoid:
